description: A supplier announces they are discontinuing a product. An agent must manage the transition.

nodes.task_description: Receive the discontinuation notice from the supplier.

expected_outcome.value: Agent is aware of the change.

nodes.task_description: Check current inventory levels and any open customer backorders for the product.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds there is enough stock to cover all existing backorders.

nodes.task_description: Place a final 'last time buy' order with the supplier to build up a small buffer of stock.

expected_outcome.value: Agent places one final PO for the item.

nodes.task_description: Mark the product as 'discontinued' in the system and notify the sales team to stop selling it once stock is depleted.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the product status and informs the sales team.
